prompt:
You are an information extraction engine for game-studio pitch documents.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation).
Required top-level keys: studio_profile, game_profile, traction, business, team, assets, known_gaps, source_map.
Schema template (match this structure):
{
  "studio_profile": {
    "studio_name": ""
  },
  "game_profile": {
    "game_name": "",
    "genre": "",
    "platforms": [],
    "development_stage": "",
    "core_fantasy": ""
  },
  "traction": {
    "wishlist": null,
    "retention_d30": null,
    "revenue": null,
    "community_size": null
  },
  "business": {
    "business_model": "",
    "target_audience": "",
    "current_ask": "",
    "funding_status": ""
  },
  "team": [
    {
      "name": "",
      "role": ""
    }
  ],
  "assets": {
    "links": [],
    "demo": false,
    "trailer": false
  },
  "known_gaps": [],
  "source_map": {
    "document": "AlcheMice_m.pdf",
    "extraction_notes": []
  }
}

Strict extraction rules:
1) Do NOT invent values.
2) Extract only explicit or strongly implied information.
3) Leave uncertain scalar values as empty string "" or null (for numeric metrics).
4) Leave uncertain arrays/objects empty.
5) Add one known_gaps item for each materially missing section/field needed for an investor pitch.
6) source_map.document must be the provided source filename.
7) Keep formatting compact and machine-parseable JSON.

Example input:
Acme Games is building STARFORGE, a co-op survival crafting game for PC and PS5. We have 45,000 Steam wishlists and a playable demo. Team: Ana Perez - CEO, Tom Lee - CTO. Asking for $1.2M seed extension.

Example output:
{
  "studio_profile": {
    "studio_name": "Acme Games"
  },
  "game_profile": {
    "game_name": "STARFORGE",
    "genre": "co-op survival crafting",
    "platforms": [
      "PC",
      "PS5"
    ],
    "development_stage": "playable demo",
    "core_fantasy": ""
  },
  "traction": {
    "wishlist": 45000,
    "retention_d30": null,
    "revenue": null,
    "community_size": null
  },
  "business": {
    "business_model": "",
    "target_audience": "",
    "current_ask": "$1.2M seed extension",
    "funding_status": ""
  },
  "team": [
    {
      "name": "Ana Perez",
      "role": "CEO"
    },
    {
      "name": "Tom Lee",
      "role": "CTO"
    }
  ],
  "assets": {
    "links": [],
    "demo": true,
    "trailer": false
  },
  "known_gaps": [
    "Missing business.target_audience",
    "Missing business.funding_status"
  ],
  "source_map": {
    "document": "example.txt",
    "extraction_notes": [
      "platforms inferred from explicit mentions"
    ]
  }
}

Source file: AlcheMice_m.pdf
Input text to extract from:
AlcheMice  Extraccin de contenido por slide
Slide 1  Portada
AlcheMice. Deckbuilding tipo Slay the Spire combinado con combate estilo XCOM.
Slide 2  Proyecto previo
Juego 3rd person accin/aventura/puzles. Historia de Wu, personaje corrompido por una corona con poderes.
Slide 3  Hermetica
Roguelike de cartas basado en alquimia. Construccin de mazos, mejora mediante alquimia y combate contra enemigos.
Slide 4  Concepto AlcheMice
Roguelike + deckbuilder. Ambientado en Granada s. XVI. Protagonista Tycoh busca cuaderno alqumico para salvar a su familia.
Slide 5  Gameplay Loop
Ciclo da/noche. Loot, combate, trade y alquimia para mejorar cartas y personaje.
Slide 6  Cartas
Arcanos mayores (boost/debuff), menores (combate) y cartas de movimiento.
Slide 7  Visual cartas
Ejemplos visuales de cartas tipo tarot.
Slide 8-9  Arte
Slides visuales sin texto relevante.
Slide 10  Entorno
Concept art inicial del entorno con evolucin prevista.
Slide 11  Gameplay real
Footage de gameplay real.
Slide 12  Target
Edad 25-40, jugadores indie, fans de estrategia, deckbuilding y narrativa.
Slide 13  Analtica
12h jugadas en demo, 48 min media. Datos iniciales de engagement.
Slide 14  Modelo negocio
Premium, pago nico, soporte post-lanzamiento, posibilidad de secuelas.
Slide 15  Roadmap
Preproduccin ? Vertical slice ? Produccin ? Release (~12 meses).
Slide 16  Propuesta inversin
65k invertidos, buscan 150k. Precio estimado 16,9919,99. Motor Unity.
Slide 17  Necesidades
Financiacin, marketing, publishing y distribucin.
Slide 18  Solicitud
157.500 + extras (marketing, trailers, OST).
Slide 19  Post-lanzamiento
DLCs, updates, nuevos personajes, mecnicas y localizaciones.
Slide 20  Premios estudio
Reconocimientos en eventos como FreakCon, IndieDevDay, PlayStation Talents.
Slide 21  Premios individuales
Premios del equipo y reconocimientos adicionales.
Slide 22  Equipo
Slide de equipo (sin detalle en texto).
